evidence_summary: [CH002_SC003] Purpose: Execute a rapid physical transformation and an internal identity crisis.

[CH002_SC003] Summary: Alice uses the Rabbit's fan to cool herself, leading to a philosophical monologue about her identity and failed attempts at reciting lessons. She realizes she is shrinking rapidly. As she reaches two feet in height, she drops the fan...
[CH002_SC003] Emotional arc: Existential dread $\rightarrow$ Panic $\rightarrow$ Physical disorientation
[CH002_SC003] Coverage: Time-lapse or rapid scale-change shots; close-ups of Alice's face during the monologue; POV shots of the floor rushing up.
[CH002_SC003] Continuity: The shrinking rate of Alice; the size of the golden key relative to her new height.
